title: Asking for Directions

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: عَفْوًا، هَلْ يُمْكِنُكَ مُسَاعَدَتِي؟ أَنَا لَا أَعْرِفُ هَذِهِ الْمَدِينَةَ جَيِّدًا.
lines.bs: Oprostite, možete li mi pomoći? Ne poznajem dobro ovaj grad.
lines.en: Excuse me, can you help me? I do not know this city well.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: بِكُلِّ سُرُورٍ! أَيْنَ تُرِيدُ أَنْ تَذْهَبَ؟
lines.bs: S velikim zadovoljstvom! Gdje želite ići?
lines.en: With great pleasure! Where do you want to go?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: أَبْحَثُ عَنِ الْمَسْجِدِ الْكَبِيرِ. هَلْ هُوَ بَعِيدٌ مِنْ هُنَا؟
lines.bs: Tražim veliku džamiju. Je li daleko odavde?
lines.en: I am looking for the Grand Mosque. Is it far from here?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: لَا، لَيْسَ بَعِيدًا. هُوَ عَلَى بُعْدِ عَشَرِ دَقَائِقَ مَشْيًا مِنْ هُنَا.
lines.bs: Ne, nije daleko. Udaljen je deset minuta hoda odavde.
lines.en: No, it is not far. It is ten minutes' walk from here.

lines.speaker: A
lines.bs: Kako da dođem do njega, molim?
lines.en: How do I get there, please?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: اِمْشِ سَيِّدِي تِلْكَ الشَّارِعَ الرَّئِيسِيَّةَ مُبَاشَرَةً حَتَّى تَصِلَ إِلَى دَوَّارٍ.
lines.bs: Idite ravno tom glavnom ulicom dok ne stignete do kružnog toka.
lines.en: Walk straight along that main street until you reach a roundabout.

lines.speaker: A
lines.bs: Dobro, a šta radim nakon kružnog toka?
lines.en: Very well, and what do I do after the roundabout?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: عِنْدَ الدَّوَّارِ، خُذْ أَوَّلَ شَارِعٍ عَلَى الْيَسَارِ، ثُمَّ سَيِّرْ مِئَةَ مِتْرٍ.
lines.bs: Na kružnom toku skrenite u prvu ulicu lijevo, zatim idite sto metara.
lines.en: At the roundabout, take the first street on the left, then walk one hundred metres.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: وَهَلْ يُوجَدُ مَعْلَمٌ قَرِيبٌ يُسَاعِدُنِي عَلَى الْمَعْرِفَةِ؟
lines.bs: Postoji li neka bliska orijentir koji bi mi pomogao da se snađem?
lines.en: Is there a nearby landmark that would help me find the way?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ. سَتَرَى مَكْتَبَةً كَبِيرَةً عَلَى يَمِينِكَ. الْمَسْجِدُ خَلْفَ الْمَكْتَبَةِ مُبَاشَرَةً.
lines.bs: Da. Vidjet ćete veliku biblioteku na vašoj desnoj strani. Džamija je direktno iza biblioteke.
lines.en: Yes. You will see a large library on your right. The mosque is directly behind the library.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: شُكْرًا جَزِيلًا. وَهَلْ تَعْرِفُ أَيْنَ أَقْرَبُ مَحَطَّةِ الْحَافِلَةِ؟
lines.bs: Hvala lijepa. I znate li gdje je najbliža autobuska stanica?
lines.en: Thank you very much. And do you know where the nearest bus station is?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: مَحَطَّةُ الْحَافِلَةِ فِي مُقَابِلِ الْمَسْجِدِ مُبَاشَرَةً. لَا يُمْكِنُكَ إِغْفَالُهَا.
lines.bs: Autobuska stanica je direktno nasuprot džamiji. Ne možete je propustiti.
lines.en: The bus station is directly opposite the mosque. You cannot miss it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: هَذَا رَائِعٌ! لَقَدْ فَهِمْتُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ. أَنْتَ لَطِيفٌ جِدًّا.
lines.bs: Odlično! Razumio sam sve. Vi ste veoma ljubazni.
lines.en: That is wonderful! I have understood everything. You are very kind.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: لَا شُكْرَ عَلَى وَاجِبٍ. أَتَمَنَّى لَكَ زِيَارَةً مُمْتِعَةً فِي مَدِينَتِنَا!
lines.bs: Nema na čemu. Želim vam ugodan boravak u našem gradu!
lines.en: Do not mention it. I wish you an enjoyable visit in our city!

grammarFocus: imperative mood and prepositions of place (عَلَى, خَلْفَ, فِي مُقَابِلِ)
